title: BosonFermionCouplingRecord
description: A record of a boson-fermion coupling proxy extracted from the background-dependent Dirac operator variation in Phase IV.

bosonCandidateId.description: Candidate boson ID from the Phase III boson registry

fermionModeIdI.description: First fermionic mode ID in the coupling pair

fermionModeIdJ.description: Second fermionic mode ID in the coupling pair

backgroundId.description: Background record ID where this coupling was evaluated

branchManifestId.description: Branch manifest ID governing the coupling computation

couplingMagnitude.description: Magnitude of the coupling proxy |<phi_i | delta D[b_k] | phi_j>|

couplingPhase.description: Phase of the coupling proxy in radians (null for real-valued computations)

normalizationConvention.description: Normalization convention used for the coupling

symmetryHints.description: Symmetry and selection-rule hints inferred for this coupling

branchStabilityScore.description: Branch stability score for this coupling [0, 1]

refinementStabilityScore.description: Refinement stability score for this coupling [0, 1]

ambiguityNotes.description: Ambiguity notes for this coupling (e.g., multiple boson overlaps)
